# Anchor Yash Soni

> Rajasthan's premier event anchor and luxury event 
> management studio based in Jaipur, India.

## About
Yash Soni is a professional event anchor and host with 
1,100+ events hosted across India. Specializes in 
wedding anchoring, corporate events, sangeet hosting, 
and full-service event management.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://yashsoni.in
- About: https://yashsoni.in/about
- Wedding Anchoring: https://yashsoni.in/wedding-anchor-jaipur
- Corporate Events: https://yashsoni.in/corporate-event-anchor-jaipur
- Event Management: https://yashsoni.in/event-management-jaipur
- Portfolio: https://yashsoni.in/portfolio
- Blog: https://yashsoni.in/blog
- Contact: https://yashsoni.in/contact
